$schema_note: CHARACTER SPEC v1 — Phase 0 output. Source of truth for the character2d build. Each later phase APPENDS, never silently mutates earlier canon. Confidence tags: O=Observed(canon), H=High inference, M=Medium inference, L=Low inference.

source_plates.side_left: assets/reference/side_left.png  (character faces image-LEFT; near arm has NO watch)
source_plates.side_right: assets/reference/side_right.png (character faces image-RIGHT, 3/4; near arm HAS watch; frontal belt buckle + fly visible)

units.HH: head height = crown->chin on Front plate
units.HW: head width at cheekbones (bony, hair excluded)
units.side_convention: character-left / character-right = the character's OWN anatomical side, never the viewer's

WATCH_SIDE_CORRECTION.verified_canon: Watch is on the character-LEFT wrist.
WATCH_SIDE_CORRECTION.proof: Front plate: watch on viewer-RIGHT. Back plate: watch on viewer-LEFT. An item that is viewer-right in front AND viewer-left in back is, by mirror/non-mirror geometry, a LEFT-side item. Cross-checked with crops of all four wrist regions. side_right (left side toward camera) shows the watch on the near arm; side_left (right side toward camera) shows NO watch on the near arm. Four-view consistent.
WATCH_SIDE_CORRECTION.impact: Overrides locked attributes #25, #26 and assumption A3, and the §9 counter-rotation note. The watch rides the LEFT dorsal wrist and must counter-rotate with LEFT-forearm pronation.

ORTHOGRAPHIC_INCONSISTENCY.finding: The four plates are stylized / AI-generated and are NOT rigorously orthographic or cross-view rigid.
ORTHOGRAPHIC_INCONSISTENCY.proof: side_right.png simultaneously shows a FRONTAL lower torso (centered belt buckle + chino fly) AND a profile head pointing image-right AND the left-wrist watch on the near arm — a combination a rigid 90 deg turn cannot produce.
ORTHOGRAPHIC_INCONSISTENCY.impact: Pixel-exact bilateral correspondence between plates cannot be assumed. Cutout/rig must reconcile minor per-plate inconsistencies. Supersedes/expands risk R1: there is no clean orthographic RIGHT-profile plate; side_left is a left-facing profile, side_right is a right-facing 3/4 hybrid.

SLEEVE_STATE_CONFIRMED.finding: Sleeves are pushed up to just below the elbow with BARE forearms in ALL FOUR plates (front, back, side_left, side_right). Verified via wrist-band crops.
SLEEVE_STATE_CONFIRMED.impact: Blueprint claim 'sleeves pushed up the forearm' is CONFIRMED and consistent across all views (not only front+3/4). The watch sits on bare skin below the pushed sleeve.

derived.note_height: Measured ~7.7 HH SUPPORTS the 7.75 default; weakens the 8.0 alternative. Cuff read keeps it [H] not [O].

identity.one_line: Slim athletic young-adult male anime protagonist in relaxed-casual dress: messy warm-brown swept hair, dark olive-charcoal long-sleeve crew tee with sleeves pushed up the forearm, tan cuffed chinos, thin dark belt, black analog wristwatch on the LEFT wrist, cream low-top sneakers; calm neutral level gaze.

posture.value: neutral relaxed A-stance, arms hanging slightly off thighs, level eyeline, even weight; head set slightly forward of shoulders (cervical-forward, clear in profile)

render_register.value: realistic-anime, soft cel shading, low contrast, clean medium warm-brown linework

1_face_width.value: narrow-medium, ~0.66 HH at cheekbone (bony; silhouette incl. hair ~1.0 HH)

2_jaw.value: soft-tapered V, rounded chin, obtuse gonial angle

3_hair_silhouette.value: spiky-layered, crown loft, longest bangs to brow; outline sacred

4_hair_volume.value: medium-high, ~0.18 HH loft above scalp at crown

5_hair_direction.value: radial sweep from rear-crown whorl; bangs forward+outward

8_nose.value: minimal shadow accent + small tip, no full bridge

10_neck_thickness.value: medium; measured ~0.45-0.55 HW (blueprint said 0.62 — revise toward measured)

11_shoulder_width.note: HW-ratio sensitive to cheekbone-width definition; HH-ratio is the firmer figure.

15_leg_proportions.value: long; legs ~50% of total height from hip

17_shirt_fit.value: relaxed crew tee, skims torso, slight hem blouse over belt

20_lighting_logic.value: soft top-front key, low contrast, white bg

21_line_style.value: clean medium weight, dark warm-brown (NOT pure black)

23_material_response.value: matte fabric, semi-matte sneaker, low-gloss watch

24_wrinkle_placement.value: elbow, sleeve-push band, waist blouse, knee, ankle cuff

25_accessory_placement.value: WATCH ON CHARACTER-LEFT WRIST (corrected); belt at natural waist

26_watch_position.value: LEFT dorsal wrist, ~1 hand-width above wrist crease

hair.desc: warm brown / auburn, mid value, darker roots, lighter spike tips

skin.desc: light warm beige, high value, soft warm shadow

top.desc: dark olive-charcoal brown, low value, warm-dark, NOT pure black

linework.desc: dark warm brown, NOT pure black

layer_list_and_z_order.note: Live2D cutout / draw order back(low)->front(high). Numbers are nominal 0-1000 starting points for Phase 4 dynamic draw-order.
independent_artmesh_parts: L/R eye (white, iris, highlight, upper lid, lower lid)
hair regions R1 fringe / R2 sides / R3 crown spikes / R4 nape
L upper-arm / L forearm / L hand
R upper-arm / R forearm / R hand

pivots.note: Phase-3 rotation-deformer centers. Coordinates to be filled with px on first artmesh pass.
pivots.hierarchy: Torso(root) -> Shoulder Warp -> Shoulder Rotation -> Upper Arm -> Elbow Rotation -> Forearm -> Wrist Rotation -> Hand (mirror L/R); Neck -> Head; Hips -> Thigh -> Knee -> Shin -> Ankle -> Foot (mirror L/R).

R3_crown_spikes.stiffness: high (product-held; KEEP LOFT, never flatten to skull)

cloth_deform_rules.shirt: knit jersey: soft jiggle + fold-bunch at elbow/waist; hem blouses over belt
cloth_deform_rules.chino: woven twill: stiffer, hinge-folds behind knee, fixed ankle cuff; folding-dominant (low stretch)
cloth_deform_rules.sneaker: near-rigid; defines ground-contact plane + foot pivot
cloth_deform_rules.watch: rigid; rides LEFT wrist; counter-rotate with left-forearm pronation
cloth_deform_rules.belt: buckle stays centered on waist turns

hidden_geometry_overdraw_reserves: behind_hair (full scalp shell at cranial radius)
behind_arm (lateral ribcage + lat taper + side seam)

A1_bilateral_symmetry.note: No clean right-ortho; plus plates are not rigidly consistent (see ORTHOGRAPHIC_INCONSISTENCY).

A2_total_height.note: Measured ~7.71 HH supports default; 8.0 alt weakened.

A6_crown_spikes_stiff.value: product-held / coarse, gravity-defiant across all plates

open_art_direction_questions.q: CONFIRM the watch is on the CHARACTER-LEFT wrist (evidence is conclusive; blueprint said right). Approve this canon correction?
No clean orthographic RIGHT-profile plate exists, and side_right is a non-rigid 3/4 hybrid. Approve building the right side by bilateral mirror of the left until a true right plate is supplied?
Confirm exact iris hue (reads warm amber/brown at this resolution) and whether a catchlight/spec spot is canon.
Measured ~7.71 HH supports 7.75 HH default over 8.0. Lock 7.75 HH?
Character working name for file/asset naming?
Belt tail length/keeper unseen — default short tuck OK?
Reserve spare teeth/tongue layers for future lip-sync (no inner-mouth reference)?
